result.finding: Docker Compose v2 format used (no top-level 'version' field in docker-compose.yml, which is the Compose v2 specification). No explicit Docker engine version pinned; README references Docker Desktop. The absence of a 'version:' key indicates Compose Specification (Compose v2, requiring Docker Engine 20.10+).
evidence: docker-compose.yml starts directly with 'services:' — no 'version:' key, indicating Docker Compose Specification v2 format
README.md mentions 'Docker Desktop installed and running' and 'Docker Compose (included with Docker Desktop)' without version number
No CI/CD workflows contain Docker version specifications
No explicit minimum Docker version stated in documentation
values: Compose format: Compose Specification (v2, no version key)
Implied minimum: Docker Engine 20.10+ / Docker Desktop
